# BP-147 positive variant: zap is present but a handler still calls log.Println.
lang: go
file: BP-147-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: zap-and-stdlib-loggers
---
package handlers

import (
	"log"

	"go.uber.org/zap"
)

// Handle processes a request.
func Handle() {
	zap.L().Info("handler ready")
	log.Println("request received")
}
